action.reasoning: Observation: Best is 21.17% Quickdraw with CLIP ViT-B/16 5-epoch full-data. Last training run failed (rank 3 exit code 1). I have 9.39h, 13 iterations left. The training script defaults look fine. The failure may have been due to log_file path or epochs arg. Let me re-launch carefully with shorter training (4 epochs) resuming from best.pt, capturing stderr properly. Analysis: I should be cautious — the failure might be a transient distributed issue. Let me run 4 epochs fresh (not resume) on full data to ensure consistency, but with the strong sketch-bias augs that are already in the script. Actually fresh 5 epochs already gave 21.17%; resuming 3-4 more epochs should help. Decision: Resume from best.pt for 4 more epochs.
action.command: mkdir -p logs/iter_17 && python train.py --epochs 4 --batch_size 128 --resume checkpoints/best.pt --lr_backbone 5e-6 --lr_head 5e-4 2>&1 | tail -100
